← BACK TO HUB
💰 BECKY AFFILIATE PROMO STUDIO
EDUCATIONAL PRODUCT SPOTLIGHTS · NO HARD SELLING · ALWAYS DISCLOSE
⚠️ Enter your Groq API key in the Hub Engine Settings tab to activate Becky.
BECKY — HOST
Guides the conversation · Introduces the product · Asks questions
BECKY — GUEST
Shares experience · Gives honest take · Recommends softly
⚖️ FTC DISCLOSURE REQUIRED: Every affiliate video must clearly state the affiliate relationship. Becky will add a disclosure automatically. Never skip this — it protects you legally and builds trust with your audience.
📦 STEP 1 — SET YOUR PRODUCT
🪝 STEP 2 — HOOK WRITER
Becky writes 3 short hooks (6-8 seconds each). Pick your favorite. A good hook grabs attention in the first 3 words.
⏱️ STEP 3 — 30-SECOND SCRIPT
Becky writes a complete 30-second script. Helpful and educational — not pushy. Includes hook, benefit, and soft CTA.
🎭 STEP 4 — PODCAST DIALOGUE (BECKY HOST + BECKY GUEST)
Becky writes a two-person podcast conversation. Record each character separately then join in Vmake.
BECKY HOST — asks and guides · BECKY GUEST — shares experience
✍️ STEP 5 — CAPTION + CALL TO ACTION
Becky writes a social media caption with a soft CTA and hashtags for TikTok, YouTube, Instagram and Facebook.
⚖️ STEP 6 — AFFILIATE DISCLOSURE
FTC required. Becky generates the correct disclosure text for your video description AND a short spoken disclosure for the video itself.
── VIDEO PRODUCTION PIPELINE ──
🎬 FREE VIDEO CLIP PIPELINE → VMAKE
1Copy your Hook or Script from above
2Open a free clip generator — CapCut, Hailuo, or Pika — paste script, generate 6-8 second clips
3For Becky Host clips — use her avatar image with the HOST lines from the dialogue
4For Becky Guest clips — use her avatar image with the GUEST lines from the dialogue
5Download all clips to your phone or laptop
6Open Vmake — join all clips into one complete podcast video
7Add your caption, CTA and disclosure from Step 5 and 6 — then post!
